features.evidence: So far it's nice came with a screen Came with no scratches, was easy to setup, screen was in perfect condition and overall the phone is a 10/10 for me.

I would recommend this phone becasue as i said before its fun to use it is a durable phone it packs all latest processing speed strength pretty good camera and build quality. It folding into a small compact square makes this in my opinion the optimal design for a smart phone.

I would recommend this phone becasue as i said before its fun to use it is a durable phone it packs all latest processing speed strength pretty good camera and build quality. The camera on the phone is great as well.

The phone works perfectly fine , came with no issues , my only issue is it did have like 5 different updates avaliable an the battery life isn't as good as my old phone, The 1 major downside to this phone is the battery life it is not very good other than that it is an all around really fun and durable phone to use.

this one, for the price, seems to be a perfect entry for me into the world of a foldable phone. For the price here its a steal and amazon provides a pretty good buy back program if you have unused samsung phones or want to upgrade its a great opportunity to get rid of phones to get nice money off of this phone more than it already is.

I would recommend this phone becasue as i said before its fun to use it is a durable phone it packs all latest processing speed strength pretty good camera and build quality. It is flawless butter smooth scrolling speed.
